title: Xadok's Megas
description: Adds new custom megas to cobblemon!
body:
![Artwork showcasing the mega forms of the legendary bird trio](https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/9d5c14d8-d952-4f62-b7fa-9648d256f414/dlyrgh3-dbd0e703-9172-4f68-a2a4-45251c91c9a5.png/v1/fill/w_1192,h_670,q_70,strp/mega_legendary_birds___pokemon_by_xadoku_dlyrgh3-pre.jpg?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..b-XFaxv3O1UE-Ucf-Rbt26PeixSP14tzG_t-CPv_5Lw)

# Xadok's megas adds new megas to Cobblemon
I focus on making completely new models or high quality edits to ensure each mega feels different from its base form.
### CURRENT MEGAS ADDED:
**Click for crafting recipes**
<details>

### IN QUE:
- Vaporeon
- Lapras
- Ceruledge
- Noivern
- Armoruge
- Purugly


REQUIRES Cobblemon: Mega Showdown!
Whether or not this is compatible with other mega datapacks I do not know.
Datapacks must go into the datapacks folder and resourcepacks folder of your mod folder, aswell as the datapacks folder of your world folder (found inside the saves folder in your mod folder)

Stat sheet: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hkhxG2tpjF5fwD9AE4lDgJOVAol6441mfsggq17b5Ws/edit?usp=sharing


This datapack is brand new and is still being worked on, please join the discord to report any bugs, suggest new megas to be added, suggest stats/abilites to be changed, and more
https://discord.gg/hmYJj9W9Gv


Donate through Ko-fi if you would like to support me in making this project!
https://ko-fi.com/xadok

You can add this to any modpack or server.
If you use any of my original models as a base, please give credit to me
